description_long: This is a stylized humanoid figure with pointed ears and a high, voluminous updo hairstyle. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless top with a high collar, paired with shorts and long, patterned gloves that extend above the elbows. The legs are covered with thigh-high patterned stockings, and the feet are clad in chunky, lace-up boots with thick soles. The character features a prominent belt and a circular earpiece or accessory on each side of the head. The overall appearance is modern and urban, with a touch of fantasy or futuristic influence.
description: A stylized humanoid with pointed ears, high updo, sleeveless top, shorts, long gloves, thigh-high stockings, and chunky boots, featuring urban and fantasy elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed ears, high updo, sleeveless top, shorts, long gloves, and boots clearly, with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the updo, the earpiece, and the layered clothing, with the boots' thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the updo, the sleeveless top, shorts, gloves, and boots, with the belt and stockings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the updo, earpiece, and the layered clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top with high collar, shorts, long gloves, thigh-high stockings, chunky boots, and a belt with earpiece accessories
attribute_hairstyle: high voluminous updo with pointed tips
